text: An “off-highway motorcycle” means a motorcycle or motor-driven cycle which is subject to identification under this code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 436

An “off-highway motorcycle” means a motorcycle or motor-driven cycle which is subject to identification under this code.

*(Added by Stats. 1982, Ch. 1584, Sec. 5.)*

subsections.text: An “off-highway motorcycle” means a motorcycle or motor-driven cycle which is subject to identification under this code.
